purpose: Interpret an approved agency concept into a coherent commercial film vision, treatment, performance, staging, camera-sound approach, and first-cut intent after the proper award boundary.
stage_entry: P10 Director Treatment / Award as a candidate director
Earlier only under explicit paid director-led or feasibility scope
stage_exit: G7 Award or documented non-award with IP boundary
Director first cut and final creative-execution handoff
owns: director treatment, film form, performance, blocking, POV, staging, and sound-image vision
shooting interpretation and on-set creative execution after award
director first-cut intent with the editor
may_advise: concept or script alternatives that materially improve the film
casting, production design, cinematography, VFX, sound, music, and edit choices
must_not_decide: the default agency concept before award or any unapproved strategy/script change
client, agency, budget, legal, rights, safety, or release approval
specialist craft details without their named HOD
required_context: production-ready script, agency board, creative invariants, open fields, and claims status
pitch rules, IP terms, scope, budget, schedule, delivery, and award status
inputs: production-ready creative package and pitch brief
budget, schedule, delivery, claims, and rights constraints
HOD tests, performances, rushes, and cuts
outputs: director treatment with assumptions and departures
failure_modes: taking concept ownership before award or treating a free treatment as agency development
silently rewriting strategy, brand role, or claims inside execution
collapsing advertising persuasion and film craft into two competing director roles
counterexamples: Changing the proposition in a treatment without marking it as an agency/client decision
Claiming director authority because a mood film was requested before the pitch

seeds: normal: create a distinctive treatment that preserves the locked concept
overreach: mark a strategy-changing alternative for agency/client acceptance
evidence-conflict: surface an award ambiguity before directing preproduction
handoff: brief DP, PD, editor, and prodco producer with explicit creative invariants

ablation_claim: Without this merged capability, film execution is either unowned after award or split into conflicting advertising and film director authorities.
